name: AgriSense AI
description: AI-powered crop disease detection using smartphone imagery and satellite data.
problemStatement: Indian farmers lose 15-25% of crops annually due to late disease detection and lack of expert advisory.
solution: AgriSense AI uses computer vision and satellite analytics to detect crop diseases within 48 hours, sending actionable alerts in regional languages.
impact: Reduced crop loss by 32% across 12,000 farms in Nashik and Pune districts.

name: CropGuard
description: IoT-based pest monitoring and automated trap management system.
problemStatement: Pest infestations cause ₹50,000 crore annual losses with reactive rather than predictive control measures.
solution: Smart traps with IoT sensors predict pest outbreaks 2 weeks in advance using ML models trained on local climate data.
impact: Cut pesticide usage by 40% while improving yield by 18% for 8,500 farmers.

name: FarmConnect
description: Direct farm-to-market platform eliminating middlemen in supply chains.
problemStatement: Farmers receive only 30-35% of retail price due to fragmented supply chains with 4-6 intermediaries.
solution: Digital marketplace connecting farmers directly with retailers and exporters with transparent pricing and logistics.
impact: Increased farmer income by 45% for 15,000+ registered farmers.

name: GreenHarvest
description: Precision irrigation management using soil moisture sensors and weather APIs.
problemStatement: Agriculture consumes 80% of India's freshwater with inefficient flood irrigation methods.
solution: Smart irrigation controllers optimize water delivery based on real-time soil moisture, crop type, and weather forecasts.
impact: Saved 2.3 billion liters of water across 6,200 farms.

name: SoilSense
description: Portable soil testing kits with instant nutrient analysis via mobile app.
problemStatement: Farmers apply fertilizers blindly due to expensive and delayed lab soil testing.
solution: Affordable handheld device analyzes NPK levels in 5 minutes with personalized fertilizer recommendations.
impact: Reduced fertilizer costs by 35% for 10,000+ smallholder farmers.

name: DataHarvest
description: Satellite-based crop yield prediction and insurance claim verification.
problemStatement: Crop insurance claims take 60+ days with manual field verification causing farmer distress.
solution: Satellite imagery and ML models verify crop damage within 72 hours for instant insurance payouts.
impact: Processed 25,000 insurance claims with 90% accuracy in under 3 days.

name: CottonTech
description: Cotton quality grading using computer vision for fair market pricing.
problemStatement: Cotton farmers face opaque grading systems leading to unfair pricing at mandis.
solution: AI-powered grading stations provide transparent, standardized quality assessment in real-time.
impact: Improved price realization by 22% for 5,000 cotton farmers in Gujarat.

name: SolarFarm AI
description: Agrivoltaics platform optimizing solar panel placement with crop growth.
problemStatement: Land competition between solar farms and agriculture limits renewable energy expansion.
solution: Dual-use land management system maximizing both solar energy output and crop productivity.
impact: Generated 15MW clean energy while maintaining 85% crop yield on shared land.

name: AquaMap
description: Groundwater mapping and sustainable water resource management.
problemStatement: Depleting groundwater levels threaten agricultural sustainability in semi-arid regions.
solution: GIS-based aquifer mapping with predictive models for sustainable groundwater extraction planning.
impact: Mapped 500 sq km of aquifers benefiting 20,000 farmers in Telangana.

name: SkillForge
description: Vernacular skilling platform with industry-recognized certifications.
problemStatement: Only 5% of India's workforce has formal vocational training despite 12 million annual job seekers.
solution: Mobile-first platform offering courses in 12 Indian languages with employer-validated certifications.
impact: Skilled 45,000 youth with 68% placement rate within 6 months.

name: LearnPath
description: Personalized career pathways using AI-driven skills gap analysis.
problemStatement: Youth lack clarity on career paths matching their aptitudes and local job market demands.
solution: AI career counselor creates personalized learning journeys based on aptitude tests and regional job data.
impact: Guided 30,000 students with 74% achieving targeted career milestones.

name: EduBridge
description: Rural digital literacy and entrepreneurship training programs.
problemStatement: Rural youth lack digital skills needed for emerging gig economy and e-commerce opportunities.
solution: Community-based training centers teaching digital literacy, e-commerce, and micro-entrepreneurship.
impact: Trained 18,000 rural youth across 120 villages with 55% starting own ventures.

name: MfgSkills
description: Manufacturing skills training with AR-based shop floor simulations.
problemStatement: Manufacturing sector faces 2 million skilled worker shortage with outdated training methods.
solution: AR-powered virtual shop floor training for CNC, welding, and assembly line operations.
impact: Certified 8,500 workers placed in automotive and electronics manufacturing.

name: WorkRise
description: Gig economy platform connecting skilled workers with local opportunities.
problemStatement: Informal sector workers lack platforms to find dignified, fairly-paid local work opportunities.
solution: Hyperlocal gig platform matching skilled workers with businesses needing short-term expertise.
impact: Connected 22,000 workers to 45,000 gigs with average 40% income increase.

name: CraftLink
description: Artisan marketplace preserving traditional crafts with modern e-commerce.
problemStatement: Traditional artisans lose livelihoods as handmade products are displaced by mass production.
solution: Digital marketplace with storytelling, fair pricing, and logistics support for artisan communities.
impact: Onboarded 3,200 artisans with 3x income growth through direct consumer sales.

name: RuralCode
description: Coding bootcamps for rural youth targeting remote IT employment.
problemStatement: Geographic barriers prevent talented rural youth from accessing quality tech education.
solution: Intensive 6-month coding bootcamps with mentorship and remote job placement support.
impact: Placed 1,200 rural graduates in remote tech roles with average ₹6 LPA packages.

name: HeroLance
description: Women entrepreneurship accelerator with micro-credit integration.
problemStatement: Women-led enterprises receive less than 2% of venture funding in India.
solution: Accelerator program combining mentorship, market access, and integrated micro-credit for women entrepreneurs.
impact: Supported 2,800 women-led businesses with combined revenue of ₹45 crore.

name: LogiTrack Pro
description: Real-time fleet tracking and route optimization for logistics companies.
problemStatement: Indian logistics costs are 14% of GDP vs 8% globally due to inefficiencies and empty return trips.
solution: AI route optimizer reduces empty miles by matching return loads with nearby shipment demands.
impact: Reduced logistics costs by 28% for 500+ fleet operators.

name: RouteOptima
description: Last-mile delivery optimization for urban and semi-urban areas.
problemStatement: Last-mile delivery accounts for 53% of total shipping costs with poor address accuracy.
solution: ML-powered address resolution and dynamic routing for delivery personnel.
impact: Improved delivery success rate to 96% while reducing cost per delivery by 35%.

name: MobilityHub
description: Integrated urban mobility platform for public transit and micro-mobility.
problemStatement: Urban commuters face fragmented transit options with no unified payment or routing.
solution: Single app integrating metro, buses, autos, and bike-sharing with multimodal route planning.
impact: Served 2 lakh daily commuters reducing average commute time by 22%.

name: GeoVision
description: Advanced GIS platform for urban planning and infrastructure mapping.
problemStatement: Urban planners lack real-time geospatial data for evidence-based infrastructure decisions.
solution: Cloud GIS platform with 3D city models, land use analysis, and infrastructure asset management.
impact: Mapped 8 cities with 15,000+ infrastructure assets digitized.

name: InfraWatch
description: Structural health monitoring for bridges and highways using IoT sensors.
problemStatement: Aging infrastructure lacks continuous monitoring leading to catastrophic failures.
solution: Wireless sensor networks with ML anomaly detection for real-time structural health alerts.
impact: Monitoring 120 bridges and 500 km of highways with 3 early failure detections.

name: PortLink
description: Port logistics optimization and container tracking platform.
problemStatement: Port congestion and poor container tracking cause ₹10,000 crore annual trade delays.
solution: Digital twin of port operations with predictive berth scheduling and end-to-end container tracking.
impact: Reduced average port dwell time by 40% at Mundra and Kandla ports.

name: CoastalGuard
description: Coastal erosion monitoring and early warning system using satellite DEM.
problemStatement: Coastal erosion threatens 1,500 km of Tamil Nadu coastline affecting fishing communities.
solution: Satellite DEM analysis with tidal modeling provides 30-day erosion forecasts and evacuation alerts.
impact: Protected 12 fishing villages with early warning system covering 200 km coastline.
